name: Barnawartha Solar and Energy Storage

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: SLIPPING at 19 months post-award. Still 'under development' per Gentari Jul 2026. Sister project Maryvale (NSW non-CIS) already at NTP Mar 2025 with PCL as EPC. Target energisation 2027 unlikely without imminent NTP. Watch — potential BESS Sleeper Story data point.

operational_notes: Owned by Gentari — the clean-energy arm of Malaysian state oil company Petronas. CIS T1 award: 64 MW solar + 139 MWh BESS. Still 'under development' per Gentari's own project page Jul 2026 — no NTP/FID/FC announced at 19 months post-award. Sister project Maryvale (NSW, non-CIS) already at NTP Mar 2025 with PCL as EPC — Barnawartha SLIPPING against sister project. Watch for narrative-break signal in Q4 2026 tracking pieces.
